pull.title: schnorrsig: clear out masked secret key in BIP-340 nonce function
pull.body: Considering that the secret key can be determined from `masked_key` if the passed auxiliary data is known (which is optional and set to all-zeros if not explicitly provided, see `ZERO_MASK`), it seems reasonable to clear it from the stack.

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1
